mapper.select: SELECT C.ROOM_NAME AS roomName, RC.PLAY_TIME AS playTime, RC.HINT_COUNT AS hintCount, RC.PLAYER_COUNT AS peopleCount, RO.OPEN_AT AS playDate, RC.RECORD_COMMENT AS recordComment, RC.IS_ESCAPED AS isEscaped FROM RECORD RC JOIN ATTENDANCE_DETAIL AD ON RC.DETAIL_ID = AD.DETAIL_ID JOIN ATTENDANCE AT ON AD.ATTENDANCE_ID = AT.ATTENDANCE_ID JOIN RESERVATION RS ON AT.RESERVATION_ID = RS.RESERVATION_ID JOIN PARTY P ON RS.PARTY_ID = P.PARTY_ID JOIN PARTY_ROOM PR ON P.PARTY_ID = PR.PARTY_ID JOIN RES_OPEN RO ON PR.RES_OPEN_ID = RO.RES_OPEN_ID JOIN ROOM C ON RO.ROOM_ID = C.ROOM_ID WHERE AD.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY RO.OPEN_AT DESC

SELECT AD2.DETAIL_ID AS detailId, AD2.USER_ID AS targetId, UA.NICKNAME AS targetNickName, RM.ROOM_NAME, RO.OPEN_AT, CA.CAFE_NAME FROM ATTENDANCE_DETAIL AD1 JOIN ATTENDANCE_DETAIL AD2 ON AD1.ATTENDANCE_ID = AD2.ATTENDANCE_ID JOIN ATTENDANCE AT ON AD1.ATTENDANCE_ID = AT.ATTENDANCE_ID JOIN RESERVATION RS ON AT.RESERVATION_ID = RS.RESERVATION_ID JOIN PARTY_ROOM PR ON RS.PARTY_ID = PR.PARTY_ID JOIN RES_OPEN RO ON PR.RES_OPEN_ID = RO.RES_OPEN_ID JOIN ROOM RM ON RO.ROOM_ID = RM.ROOM_ID JOIN CAFE CA ON CA.CAFE_ID = RM.CAFE_ID JOIN USER_ACCOUNT UA ON AD2.USER_ID = UA.USER_ID WHERE AD1.USER_ID = #{userId} AND AD2.USER_ID != AD1.USER_ID
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MUTUAL_EVALUATION ME JOIN ATTENDANCE_DETAIL AD3 ON ME.DETAIL_ID = AD3.DETAIL_ID WHERE AD3.ATTENDANCE_ID = AD1.ATTENDANCE_ID AND ME.TARGET_ID = AD2.USER_ID ) ORDER BY RO.OPEN_AT DESC
